product.title: Black Radiance True Complexion Creme Contour Palette, Medium to Dark, 7.5 Gram
featureBullets: READY, SET, CONTOUR: Black Radiance True Complexion Contour Palette highlights, shapes, & sculpts facial features for naturally enhanced definition. Create the perfect foundation for your look
CONTOUR PALETTE: Sculpt, define, & highlight your best features & achieve a look that's perfect for your skin tone. Our set of blendable shades lets you customize foundation, highlighter, & bronzer
LOVE YOUR SHADE: For more than two decades, Black Radiance has pursued its vision to be the expert & resource for black beauty. We have a wide range of cosmetics for darker skin tones

EMPOWERED BEAUTY: Black Radiance combines high style with the latest technology, offering exclusively formulated foundations, concealers, highlighters, eye & lip colors for a diverse range of skin tones.

BLACK BEAUTY MATTERS: We enable women of color around the world to be even more beautiful. Black Radiance highlights the strength & beauty of today’s black women with a portfolio of luxurious, affordable cosmetics.
product.description: Black Radiance True Complexion Creme Contour Palette makes it easy to become a master of disguise! The new all-in-one palette sculpts contours and defines to emphasize your favorite features. Use the three creams to enhance your features to ultra-defined modelesque features. Use effortless True Complexion Creme Contour Palette from Black Radiance for effortless contouring. Use it to define your cheekbones, perfect your nose, and sculpt your jawline. The oil free, creamy, blendable shades provides full coverage in your perfect tone. Black Radiance True Complexion Creme Contour Palette makes it easy to become a master of disguise! The new all-in-one palette sculpts contours and defines to emphasize your favorite features .Use the three creams to enhance your features to ultra-defined modelesque features.

specification.value: #12,359 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #70 in Concealers & Neutralizing Makeup

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find the contour palette's colors perfect for their complexion and appreciate its three complementary shades. Moreover, the product works well with various skin tones, blends easily, and has a creamy consistency that's beginner-friendly. They like its appearance, with one customer noting its natural shimmer, and consider it good value for money.

reviews.reviewText: 💄 I’m loving my new Black Radiance True Complexion Crème Contour Palette! The shades are rich, creamy, and blend like a dream. With three versatile colors, it’s perfect for sculpting, defining, and enhancing your natural features. 🎨 Although I initially ordered a shade that was too dark for my skin tone, the return process was smooth—and the lighter palette I got next is a flawless match. It’s proof that finding the right shade makes all the difference! 🌟 This palette is a must-have in any makeup routine. I’ve tried several contour kits over the years, and this one easily outperforms them. The texture is smoother, the colors are more pigmented, and the blendability is next-level. Whether you're going for subtle definition or full glam, it delivers professional-looking results with ease. 💫 Definitely a 5-star product in my book!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on August 12, 2025
Reviewed in the United States on March 26, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Does its job well! It’s pigmented and easy to blend..
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 6, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I’ve been loving this palette for a few weeks now and overall I’m really impressed as someone with deeper skin finding contour products that actually shows up on my skin and blends but this was exception which truly delivers in terms of pigment and richness the shades are warm bold and made with melanin rich skin in mind which I really appreciate the texture is creamy and easy to work with it glides on to the sling like butter using a brush or sponge and doesn’t leave that cakey or greasy feeling some cream leaves behinds the clinger shed give great definition the sculpting color is warms up the face nicely and the highlight has a lovely glow not too sparkly or chalky the packaging feels a bit flimsy and the lid doesn’t always snap shut securely so it’s not the most travel friendly also wish the pans were slightly bigger some I use the contour shade more than others still the price and quality is great but especially for women of color definitely would repurchase
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on August 13, 2025
Reviewed in the United States on March 29, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Decent contouring palette easy to use
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on November 13, 2025

reviews.reviewText: I really love this crème contour palette. The texture blends beautifully, and the shades match my skin tone perfectly. One of my favorite things is the application guide on the inside of the palette. It makes it so easy to know exactly where to place each color, even if you’re not a makeup pro. The colors warm my skin in such a natural way without looking heavy or overdone. It gives me a soft, sculpted look that still feels like my own skin. This palette has definitely become a go to in my routine.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 7, 2025
Reviewed in the United States on March 6, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I really like the guide they've included on how to use the product, good for beginners like myself. Quite pricey.. Blends out beautifully though, really love it.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on July 23, 2020
Reviewed in the United Arab Emirates on July 24, 2022

reviews.reviewText: I just started doing my own make up and I must say I love the contour palette it make it easy for a beginner like me to know where to put each shade.
